scripts.test:editor-content: rm -rf .tmp-tests && tsc src/editorContent.ts src/topicSelection.ts src/imageEditorSource.ts --module NodeNext --target ES2020 --moduleResolution NodeNext --lib ES2020,DOM --outDir .tmp-tests --rootDir src && node --test tests/editor-content.test.mjs tests/topic-selection.test.mjs tests/image-editor-source.test.mjs
scripts.test:smoke: npm run build && npm run test:editor-content && npm run test:workspace-contract
scripts.check:topic-preview-flow: rm -rf .tmp-tests && tsc src/editorContent.ts src/topicSelection.ts src/imageEditorSource.ts --module NodeNext --target ES2020 --moduleResolution NodeNext --lib ES2020,DOM --outDir .tmp-tests --rootDir src && node --test tests/topic-selection.test.mjs tests/image-editor-source.test.mjs
